# XitSource

XitSource provides strategic partnerships for Northern California owners navigating business exits, optimizing operations, and growing asset value through acquisitions and digital marketing. John Poindexter and Ryan Peterson are the founding partners.

## Core Expertise

- **Residential Homes**: NorCal residential focus on off-market value in Roseville/Sacramento. (https://xitsource.com/sectors/residential-homes)
- **Raw Land Development**: Vision for entitlement and development from Tahoe to the Valley. (https://xitsource.com/sectors/raw-land)
- **Web Development**: High-performance Next.js 15 builds as a business foundation. (https://xitsource.com/sectors/web-development)
- **Social Media Marketing**: Localized 'Social-First' approach for NorCal scaling. (https://xitsource.com/sectors/social-media-marketing)
- **GrowthToolBox**: Digital acceleration arm providing SEO-optimized web builds and marketing. (https://xitsource.com/sectors/growth-toolbox)

Our coming soon sectors include RV Parks, Laundromats, Storage Units, 1-on-1 Business Consulting, and Operational Optimization.
